skip_reason: Relies on meta[name='description'] containing a ' - <name> on Instagram:' pattern and document.body.innerHTML containing a 'profilePage_<id>"' marker, both of which Instagram only renders for fully server-rendered/logged-out-compatible profile pages in certain locales/conditions. In current headless CI (no session, possible login wall or React-only shell), these markers are frequently absent, leaving displayName/username/instagramId as 'Not Found'. The modal still renders with placeholders, which does not meaningfully validate extraction, so this is skipped pending a known-good fixture.
notes: Passive - V9 modal (id: __igUserOsintModal) titled 'Instagram User Profile Details'. Reads meta[name='description'] (format '... - DisplayName (@username) on Instagram: ...') and searches document.body.innerHTML for a 'profilePage_<id>"' marker to get the numeric Instagram user ID. Shows Username, Display Name, Instagram ID, Current URL, User ID URL, plus export buttons. Extracted timestamp pinned at right of export row.

checks.text_contains: Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training
